signals.reasoning: Hold and keep managing the live TON short. It is now back to a strong winner at +$86.53, retaining about 98% of peak P&L, and the updated macro backdrop still supports a risk-off tape.
BTC is already in a liquidation flush, so I would not chase a fresh short after the first dump leg.
ETH is also already flushing and no longer offers a clean fresh edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains one of the cleaner reduced-size shorts because price is still down with fresh shorts pressing rather than fully washed out.
SPX is already deep in a flush and I would rather wait for a bounce than force a fresh short under veto.
MERL is already deep into a liquidation flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
DASH is mixed, with some squeeze fuel from negative funding but no clean enough setup to override the active veto.
WCT is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
VIRTUAL has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but after the broad dump I would rather wait for a cleaner reset before taking either side.
RENDER is a modest reduced-size short lean because the tape is still weak and the coin is slipping without any sign of real support yet.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
